# terrible_cisco_intersight_intersight_iscsi_static_target_policy (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `name` (String) The name assigned to the iSCSI Static Target Policy. Must be unique within the organization. The name must be between 1 and 62 alphanumeric characters, allowing special characters :-_.

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `description` (String) The user-defined description for the iSCSI Static Target Policy. Description can contain letters(a-z, A-Z), numbers(0-9), hyphen(-), period(.), colon(:), or an underscore(_).
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `ip_protocol` (String) Type of the IP address requested for iSCSI vNIC. IPv4 or IPv6. Required when state is present.
- `ipv4_address` (String) The IPv4 address assigned to the iSCSI target. Required when ip_protocol is IPv4 and state is present.
- `ipv6_address` (String) The IPv6 address assigned to the iSCSI target. Required when ip_protocol is IPv6 and state is present.
- `lun_id` (Number) The Logical Unit Number (LUN) Identifier for the iSCSI target. Valid values are 0 or greater (typically 0-255). Required when state is present.
- `organization` (String) The name of the Organization this resource is assigned to. Policies created within a Custom Organization are applicable only to devices in the same Organization. Use 'default' for the default organization.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `port` (Number) The port associated with the iSCSI target. Valid range is 1-65535. Common iSCSI port is 3260. Required when state is present.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) If `present`, will verify the resource is present and will create if needed. If `absent`, will verify the resource is absent and will delete if needed.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `target_name` (String) Qualified Name (IQN) or Extended Unique Identifier (EUI) name of the iSCSI target. This is the name that uniquely identifies the target in the iSCSI network. Example IQN format - iqn.1991-05.com.microsoft:winclient1 Example EUI format - eui.02004567A425678D Required when state is present.
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `api_response` (String) The API response output returned by the specified resource.
- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
